title: GOP’s McCarthy pressured to ‘figure out’ speaker race
NH Dems ask national party not to ‘punish’ them on primary
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — New Hampshire Democrats on Thursday asked the national party not to “punish” them while overhauling its 2024 presidential primary calendar, arguing that implementing the proposed shakeup may amount to a “poison pill” against their state's traditional role as among the first to vote.

title: Biden intends to make his first visit to US-Mexico border
shortDescription: HEBRON, Ky. (AP) — President Joe Biden intends to visit the U.S.-Mexico border — his first trip there since taking office — in connection with his meeting next week in Mexico City with the leaders of Mexico and Canada.

title: Biden weighs sending Bradley Fighting Vehicles to Ukraine
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden said Wednesday that the U.S. is considering sending Bradley Fighting Vehicles to help Ukraine combat Russia’s ongoing invasion.Biden was asked during an exchange with reporters while traveling in Kentucky whether providing the tracked armored fighting vehicle to Ukraine was on the table.

title: Biden’s agenda, lithium mine, tribes, greens collide in Reno
shortDescription: RENO, Nev. (AP) — A high-stakes, yearslong legal battle over a huge lithium mine planned in Nevada resumes Thursday with arguments from lawyers for the mining company, the U.S. agency that approved it and the rancher, tribes and conservationists fighting the project.

title: U.S. pledges $30m to Moldova hit hard by war in Ukraine
shortDescription: CHISINAU, Moldova (AP) — The U.S. will provide $30 million in aid to Moldova to help the small country tackle an energy crisis and other economic hardships “caused by the Kremlin’s unprovoked and unjustified war” against Ukraine, a U.S.

title: Ex-Philadelphia official picked for key elections post
shortDescription: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — A former Philadelphia election official who has told of enduring death threats for defending the city's 2020 vote-counting against former President Donald Trump's lies will be nominated for the top election administration post in Pennsylvania.

title: New Biden-picked majority sworn in for federal utility
shortDescription: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — A new board majority appointed by President Joe Biden to oversee the nation’s largest public utility has officially been sworn into office. The Tennessee Valley Authority says the six Biden nominees took the oath of office Wednesday from a federal magistrate judge in Knoxville.

title: Katie Hobbs to give inaugural address as Arizona governor
shortDescription: PHOENIX (AP) — Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs will outline her vision for the next four years during her inaugural address Thursday, ushering in an era of divided government and Democratic ascendance in a state long dominated by Republicans.

title: GOP’s McCarthy rejected for House speaker — again and again
Kentucky gov touts economy, resilience after tragedies
shortDescription: FRANKFORT, Ky. (AP) — Heading into a tough election year, Gov. Andy Beshear asserted Wednesday evening that Kentucky's future is “brighter than it has ever been” while touting a record of economic development and resilience to make his case.

title: Russia’s hypersonic missile-armed ship to patrol global seas
shortDescription: Russian President Vladimir Putin on Wednesday sent a frigate armed with the country's latest Zircon hypersonic missile on a trans-ocean cruise in a show of force as tensions with the West escalate over the war in Ukraine.

title: Jill Biden to have lesion removed from above right eye
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jill Biden will undergo a medical procedure next week to remove a small lesion from above her right eye that was discovered during a routine skin cancer screening, the White House announced Wednesday.

title: Prince Andrew case cited by woman who accused Trump of rape
shortDescription: NEW YORK (AP) — Lawyers for a former advice columnist who says Donald Trump raped her in a department store dressing room in the 1990s are fighting his efforts to toss out a lawsuit by reminding a judge of his own ruling in a similar lawsuit against Prince Andrew.

title: Trump lawyers questioned Nevada’s 2020 vote, records show
shortDescription: WASHINGTON (AP) — Nevada's most populous county has provided the U.S. Justice Department special counsel with correspondence that shows lawyers for then-President Donald Trump raising concerns about the integrity of the 2020 voting process that were later deemed baseless, according to documents obtained by The Associated Press.

title: Massachusetts GOP Gov. Baker marks final full day in office
shortDescription: BOSTON (AP) — Massachusetts Gov. Charlie Baker engaged in a series of traditional ceremonies during his last full day as governor on Wednesday, marking the transition of power in the top office on Beacon Hill from Republican to Democratic hands.

title: Missouri lawmakers back at work with eye on ballot measures
shortDescription: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Missouri lawmakers returned to work Wednesday for a session that Republican leaders have said will focus on issues including making it harder to amend the state Constitution.

title: Connecticut Gov. Ned Lamont sworn into office, seeks tax cut
shortDescription: Sworn into office for a second four-year term, Connecticut Gov. Ned Lamont on Wednesday called on state legislators to pass a "meaningful middle class tax cut," saying it's time for the state to refocus on economic growth and opportunity now that the emergency of the pandemic is fading and years of state fiscal crises have ended.

title: Jan. 6 attack 2 years later: Trump still plagued by multiple investigations
shortDescription: Two years after the deadly Capitol attack, Trump’s potential legal exposure has only grown more perilous, with his future political viability unknown.

title: Meet Byron Donalds, the GOP representative nominated for House speaker
shortDescription: Republican opponents to GOP Rep. Kevin McCarthy as House speaker nominated Florida Rep. Byron Donalds for speaker of the House as voting continues.

title: Biden and McConnell appear together, striking contrast to Kevin McCarthy House chaos
shortDescription: McConnell hailed a $1.6 billion bridge project for Kentucky and Ohio a legislative miracle.' Biden said it proves "we can work together."

title: What happens after McCarthy loses speaker votes? The process explained
shortDescription: Candidates for speaker are nominated from the floor by members of their parties. The speaker who is chosen does not have to be a member of Congress.

title: Congress' 2nd day takeaways: McCarthy keeps losing, Biden mocks GOP
shortDescription: The ongoing defeats came despite pleas to the rebel faction from former President Donald Trump and former Vice President Mike Pence to back McCarthy.

title: Live updates: House speaker vote on third day after McCarthy losses
shortDescription: The vote for a new speaker of the House dragged into day three Thursday as Republican leader Rep. Kevin McCarthy lost six ballots in two days.

title: McCarthy at a loss on day two of speaker vote
shortDescription: McCarthy couldn't secure 218 votes in the sixth round of voting for speaker of the House. The failure to elect on the initial ballot hasn't happened in a century.

title: Biden urges Supreme Court to uphold student loan forgiveness program
shortDescription:
Biden urged the Supreme Court to uphold his stalled student loan forgiveness plan in a brief filed in 
pair of suits challenging its legality.

title: OnPolitics: House still in chaos as Biden says 'it's not my problem'
shortDescription: Biden preaches bipartisanship with McConnell, tweeting "when we work together, we can get things done.” It's a sharp contrast to the House floor.

title: Biden to visit border for first time in his presidency en route to Mexico
shortDescription: President Biden says it's his 'intention' to visit the U.S.-Mexico border.

title: Biden praises McConnell for bipartisan work
shortDescription: President Joe Biden praised Minority Leader Mitch McConnell for his bipartisan cooperation to pass infrastructure legislation in Covington, Kentucky.

title: Why DeSantis and Republicans have declared war on corporate America
shortDescription: Republicans like Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis are waging war against "corporate wokeness" from CRT to ESG to score political points with their base.

title: FBI ups reward in Capitol pipe bomb probe to $500K
shortDescription: Pipe bombs were planted near the Republican and Democratic national committee headquarters the night before the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol attack.

title: New Hampshire Democrats to DNC: Please don't punish us in 2024 primary
shortDescription: New Hampshire Democrats say they have no ability to change state election laws to comply with the DNC's 2024 presidential nominating calendar mandate.

title: Meet Hakeem Jeffries, Pelosi's successor for Democratic leadership
shortDescription: House Democrats voted to elect Hakeem Jeffries as leader. Here's what you should know about the representative from NY's 8th congressional district.

title: Kevin McCarthy fails to win votes for speaker
shortDescription: GOP leader Kevin McCarthy failed to win 218 votes to become speaker of the House after three rounds of voting.

title: GOP rebels reject McCarthy as House adjourns without a speaker: recap
shortDescription: GOP turmoil sank Republican Rep. Kevin McCarthy on three votes for speaker of the House in the new Congress. Dem. Rep. Hakeem Jeffries also got votes.

title: OnPolitics: House GOP fails to elect new leader in historic first
shortDescription: Not since 1923 has the vote for a new speaker needed more than one ballot. Here's what's next.

title: After George Santos is sworn into Congress, could he be impeached?
shortDescription: George Santos, a newly elected New York Republican congressman, admitted last week to lying to voters about his life. What can Congress do about it?

title: Notable lawmakers to know: Who will be leading Congress in 2023?
shortDescription: It's the first day of the 118th Congress which means a fresh set of senators and representatives are being seated. Here are the lawmakers to watch.

title: McCarthy calls out Gaetz over speaker election
shortDescription: Rep. Kevin McCarthy is facing challenges from other Republicans in his bid to be elected speaker of the House.

title: Who are the Republicans balking at Kevin McCarthy as a House speaker?
shortDescription: There are two main groups of GOP lawmakers who could stand in Kevin McCarthy's way of becoming the next House speaker when the new Congress is seated.

title: In Child Welfare Cases, Most of Your Constitutional Rights Don’t Apply
shortDescription: The child welfare system rarely offers the same rights as the criminal justice system, leaving many families facing permanent separation without due process protections.

title: Patients Went to This Isolated Facility for Treatment. Instead, Nearly Two Dozen Were Charged With Crimes.
shortDescription: For years, residents at the Illinois facility received scant treatment for their developmental disabilities and mental illnesses, then faced felonies for lashing out at staff.

title: The IRS Hasn’t Released Nearly Half a Million Nonprofit Tax Records
shortDescription: If you’re trying to evaluate a charity this year, you might have a hard time. The IRS is behind on releasing Form 990s, limiting access to key financial information the public uses to evaluate the nation’s tax-exempt companies.

title: What Will Republicans Do With Their House Majority?
shortDescription: The Democratic Party’s federal trifecta is ending. What comes next?By Spencer Bokat-Lindell

title: House’s speaker drama shrinks congressional agenda
shortDescription: The legislative expectations for the current Congress were already low. The House GOP’s speaker fight has sent them plummeting further.
